title: ジャスティス・ビコー参上！

text_block_list.name: Announcer
text_block_list.text:
It's what you've all been waiting for—the Special
Hero Show! Brought to you by Tracen Academy's
very own!

text_block_list.name: Windy the Very Bad
text_block_list.text: Heh, heh, heh! They call me Windy the Very Bad! Sluuurp!

text_block_list.name: Dangerous Beauty
text_block_list.text: Ohohoho! And my name is Dangerous Beauty!

text_block_list.name: Pearl & Windy
text_block_list.text:
We villains will change the world! Together, we
are Worldwide Windy!

text_block_list.name: Children
text_block_list.text: Aaaagh! So scaryyyy!

text_block_list.name: Dangerous Beauty
text_block_list.text:
Now, my little minions. Follow us down the path
of darkness, and the world will be yours for the
taking! Candy for breakfast and cake for lunch!

text_block_list.name: Windy the Very Bad
text_block_list.text:
You can drink your favorite juice as much as you
want! No more icky, yucky veggies!

Not on my watch!
Hup!

text_block_list.name: Justice Biko
text_block_list.text:
I fight for justice and all the good little kids in the
world! Justice Biko, reporting for duty!

text_block_list.name: Doctor Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
And I, Doctor Tachyon, have your back. Make
free use of my experimenting prowess!

text_block_list.name: Children
text_block_list.text: Wow, it's Justice Biko and Doctor Tachyon!

text_block_list.name: Justice Biko
text_block_list.text:
Too many sweets will give you a nasty toothache!
You two, this is as far as you go. I will vanquish
your dastardly desires!

text_block_list.name: Dangerous Beauty
text_block_list.text:
Ohohohoho! That should hardly be a problem if
you clean your teeth well!

text_block_list.name: Windy the Very Bad
text_block_list.text:
And I'll tell these kiddos how to brush their teeth
really good!

text_block_list.name: Justice Biko
text_block_list.text:
Urk, how graciously thoughtful for evildoers! But
having a balanced diet trumps all!

text_block_list.name: Doctor Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Precisely, Justice Biko. But we must make use of that if we are to thwart their evil.

text_block_list.name: Doctor Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
And by "that," I mean Justice Smoke! This device I
have here will release a jet of smoke, temporarily
clouding their vision!

text_block_list.name: Doctor Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Use these special goggles. With them, you'll be
able to crush those evildoers at full force!

text_block_list.name: Justice Biko
text_block_list.text:
All right, I'll give them a good Justice Kick from
the rear... Wait, isn't this cheating?!

text_block_list.name: Doctor Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
No, it's in the name of justice. Besides... no one
will witness what you do to them in the smoke.

text_block_list.name: Justice Biko
text_block_list.text:
Whaaat?! I hear the devil whispering in my ear!
But I won't be tempted!

text_block_list.name: Children
text_block_list.text: You can do it, Justice Bikooo!

text_block_list.name: Windy the Very Bad
text_block_list.text: Y'know, Tachyon looks like the real villain here...

text_block_list.name: Dangerous Beauty
text_block_list.text:
But the children are enjoying this, so let's keep it
up! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Justice Biko is victorious, and the children are
thoroughly entertained by her heroics! Justice
prevails!
